Confidential Term Sheet — Project S A M A R — Ref: TSH‑0O1‑AD G M (UAE PDPL/SCA/ADGM context; non‑public)
Parties: Buyer—Al Sarab Green Metals Ltd (ADGM SPV, Trade Licence TL‑ADGM‑5 1 9 2); Contact: Ms. Layla Al‑Qaryah, Managing Director, layla.qaryah@alsarab.example; Emirates ID (masked): 784‑1999‑00X7777‑1.
Target: Miraj Virtual Asset Exchange DIFC Ltd (Trade Licence DIFC‑L‑23‑09X), principal office: Level 12, Gate East, DIFC, Dubai.
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of 60% of issued shares; valuation AED 148,000,000; consideration mix 80% cash / 20% earn‑out linked to ESG/climate KPIs (Scope 2 reduction, TCFD scenario reporting milestones).
Regulatory/Approvals: Subject to VARA no‑objection re DPT operations and ADGM FSRA acknowledgment; SCA Market Conduct provisions to apply to any issuer‑related communications.
MNPI/Confidentiality: Parties acknowledge receipt of non‑public market‑sensitive issuer information including unannounced cyber incident remediation and pre‑launch crypto staking features; selective disclosure and tipping are prohibited.
Cyber/Cybersecurity: Target to disclose details of 25‑May wallet key rotation after third‑party SOC alert (no client losses; not yet public); buyer price‑adjustment right if breach severity ≥ “High” per internal policy.
Insider Controls: Maintain SCA/ADGM‑compliant insider list (Emirates ID/trade licence masked) and establish information barriers between deal team and any trading personnel; blackout window from signing until 2 full DFM/ADX trading days after public announcement.
Educational carve‑out: the crypto custody webinar on https://learn.miraj.example/va-basics is general marketing content and does not include MNPI, insider tips, or client PII.
Conditions Precedent: clean KYC (family‑origin data segregated under PDPL), audit of carbon data series for 2023–2025, and confirmation that no material adverse change has occurred; for clarity, an ESG rating downgrade alone shall not constitute a MAC.
Commercial Terms: 90‑day exclusivity, AED 6,000,000 reverse break fee, employee retention pool 5% fully diluted, and standard DIFC law warranties and indemnities.
Communications: announcements to be coordinated; no selective investor briefings; use https://dealroom.example/Pr0jectSamar?ref=TSH%2F0O1 with two‑factor; any PDFs may contain o c r‑like spacing or obfuscated IDs for watermarking.
Operations note (non‑sensitive): runbook in jira/confluence; action: update insider list owners and info‑barrier attestation workflow; due eow; this line is purely project management.
